kobePurple:Choreograph.NAME: Choreograph
kobePurple:Choreograph.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL At the end of this turn, Retain up to !M! card. NL Upgrade it for the rest of combat.
kobePurple:Choreograph.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL At the end of this turn, Retain up to !M! cards. NL Upgrade them for the rest of combat.

kobePurple:Condemn.NAME: Condemn
kobePurple:Condemn.DESCRIPTION: If you are in Divinity, halve each enemy's HP, otherwise deal !D! damage !M! times.

kobePurple:HeroicStrike.NAME: Heroic Strike
kobePurple:HeroicStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Add a *Miracle into your hand.

kobePurple:Conundrum.NAME: Conundrum
kobePurple:Conundrum.DESCRIPTION: If the enemy has Weak, apply !M! Vulnerable, otherwise apply !kobePurple:SecondMagic! Weak.

kobePurple:EbbAndFlow.NAME: Ebb and Flow
kobePurple:EbbAndFlow.DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL Enter a random Stance. NL Exhaust.

kobePurple:Ecstasy.NAME: Ecstasy
kobePurple:Ecstasy.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Vigor. NL Gain Mantra equal to your Vigor. NL Exhaust.
kobePurple:Ecstasy.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Vigor. NL Gain Mantra equal to your Vigor.

kobePurple:Fathom.NAME: Fathom
kobePurple:Fathom.DESCRIPTION: Scry the bottom !M! cards of your draw pile, then put its new bottom card into your hand.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Choose any number of cards to discard. The rightmost remaining card will be put into your hand.

kobePurple:Foreshadow.NAME: Foreshadow
kobePurple:Foreshadow.DESCRIPTION: Next turn, your first card is played twice. NL End your turn.
kobePurple:Foreshadow.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Next turn, your first card is played twice.

kobePurple:KnowYourself.NAME: Know Yourself
kobePurple:KnowYourself.DESCRIPTION: Duplicate the leftmost non-Rare card in your hand. NL Exhaust.
kobePurple:KnowYourself.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL Duplicate the leftmost non-Rare card in your hand. NL Exhaust.

kobePurple:NeuralOverload.NAME: Neural Overload
kobePurple:NeuralOverload.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! *Mark. NL ALL *Marked enemies lose !kobePurple:SecondMagic! Strength this turn.

kobePurple:Predict.NAME: Predict
kobePurple:Predict.DESCRIPTION: Guess the type of your draw pile's top card. NL If correct, play it.
kobePurple:Predict.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Guess the type of your draw pile's top card. NL If correct, play it, otherwise Scry !M!.

kobePurple:Ward.NAME: Ward
kobePurple:Ward.DESCRIPTION: Gain Block equal to twice the amount of [W] gained this turn.
kobePurple:Ward.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain Block equal to twice the amount of [W] gained this turn +!M!.

kobePurple:BackToBasics.NAME: Back to Basics
kobePurple:BackToBasics.DESCRIPTION: If you have 5 or more kobepurple:Common cards in your hand at the start of your turn, gain !M! Block.

kobePurple:Relentless.NAME: Relentless
kobePurple:Relentless.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play your sixth card each turn, draw 2 cards and gain [W].

kobePurple:Synchronize.NAME: Synchronize
kobePurple:Synchronize.DESCRIPTION: Wrath: Gain !M! Strength. NL Calm: Gain !M! Dexterity. NL Divinity: Gain 1 Intangible.
kobePurple:Synchronize.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Wrath: Gain !M! Strength. NL Calm: Gain !M! Dexterity. NL Divinity: Gain !kobePurple:SecondMagic! Regen and 1 Intangible.

kobePurple:PredictAttack.NAME: Attack
kobePurple:PredictAttack.DESCRIPTION: If the top card of your draw pile is an *Attack, play it.
kobePurple:PredictAttack.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: If the top card of your draw pile is an *Attack, play it, otherwise NL Scry !M!.

kobePurple:PredictSkill.NAME: Skill
kobePurple:PredictSkill.DESCRIPTION: If the top card of your draw pile is a *Skill, play it.
kobePurple:PredictSkill.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: If the top card of your draw pile is a *Skill, play it, otherwise NL Scry !M!.

kobePurple:PredictPower.NAME: Power
kobePurple:PredictPower.DESCRIPTION: If the top card of your draw pile is a *Power, play it.
kobePurple:PredictPower.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: If the top card of your draw pile is a *Power, play it, otherwise NL Scry !M!.
